changes.value:
## What

Implement real `Initializable` for tools that have init/deinit needs. These replace the `impl_empty_initializable!` for those specific tools.

**Shell tool:**
- `init`: Owns the "deny Bash" logic (currently hardcoded in `init.rs::install_deny_bash()`). Adds `Bash` to `.claude/settings.json` `permissions.deny`.
- `deinit`: Removes `Bash` from `permissions.deny`.
- Priority: 25 (after project structure, before skills)

**Code-context tool:**
- `init`: Creates `.code-context/` directory, adds it to `.gitignore` if not present. Does NOT start LSP or indexing â€” that's MCP server startup behavior.
- `deinit`: Removes `.code-context/` directory.
- Priority: 22 (after project structure)

**Files:**
- EDIT: `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs` â€” replace `impl_empty_initializable!` with real impl
- EDIT: `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` â€” replace `impl_empty_initializable!` with real impl
- EDIT: `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/init.rs` â€” register tool initializers alongside system components

**Key design point:** The `sah init` command needs to instantiate tool structs to call their `init()` methods, but does NOT need the full MCP server. Tools implement `Initializable` on lightweight struct instances â€” no `ToolContext` needed for init.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `ShellExecuteTool` implements `Initializable` with deny-bash logic
- [ ] `CodeContextTool` implements `Initializable` with .code-context/ creation
- [ ] `install_deny_bash()` removed from monolithic init.rs
- [ ] `sah init` creates `.code-context/` directory
- [ ] `sah init` still denies Bash tool in settings
- [ ] `sah deinit` cleans up both
- [ ] No LSP or MCP server started during `sah init`

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-tools` passes
- [ ] Manual: `sah init` in a fresh project creates `.code-context/`, denies Bash
- [ ] Manual: `sah deinit` removes `.code-context/`, restores Bash permission

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,34 +1,44 @@
 ## What

-Implement real `Initializable` for tools that have init/deinit needs. These replace the `impl_empty_initializable!` for those specific tools.
+Implement real `Initializable` for tools that have lifecycle needs. These replace the `impl_empty_initializable!` for those specific tools.

 **Shell tool:**
-- `init`: Owns the "deny Bash" logic (currently hardcoded in `init.rs::install_deny_bash()`). Adds `Bash` to `.claude/settings.json` `permissions.deny`.
-- `deinit`: Removes `Bash` from `permissions.deny`.
+- `init()`: Owns the "deny Bash" logic (currently hardcoded in `init.rs::install_deny_bash()`). Adds `Bash` to `.claude/settings.json` `permissions.deny`.
+- `deinit()`: Removes `Bash` from `permissions.deny`.
 - Priority: 25 (after project structure, before skills)
+- No `start()`/`stop()` â€” shell has no background work.

 **Code-context tool:**
-- `init`: Creates `.code-context/` directory, adds it to `.gitignore` if not present. Does NOT start LSP or indexing â€” that's MCP server startup behavior.
-- `deinit`: Removes `.code-context/` directory.
+- `init()`: Creates `.code-context/` directory, adds it to `.gitignore` if not present. Does NOT start LSP or indexing.
+- `deinit()`: Removes `.code-context/` directory.
+- `start()`: Runs background indexing, LSP supervisor, file watcher. This is the code currently in `initialize_code_context()` (which card A moved to `ServerHandler::initialize()`). This card replaces that hardcoded call with a proper `Initializable::start()` impl.
+- `stop()`: Shuts down LSP supervisor, stops file watcher.
 - Priority: 22 (after project structure)

+**`init` and `start` are separate concerns:**
+- `init` = project setup, runs during `sah init`, filesystem only
+- `start` = runtime background work, runs during `sah serve` when the server explicitly iterates tools
+
 **Files:**
-- EDIT: `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs` â€” replace `impl_empty_initializable!` with real impl
-- EDIT: `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` â€” replace `impl_empty_initializable!` with real impl
+- EDIT: `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs` â€” replace `impl_empty_initializable!` with real impl (init/deinit only)
+- EDIT: `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` â€” replace `impl_empty_initializable!` with real impl (init/deinit/start/stop)
+- EDIT: `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/server.rs` â€” replace hardcoded `initialize_code_context()` call in `ServerHandler::initialize()` with tool registry iteration calling `start()`
 - EDIT: `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/init.rs` â€” register tool initializers alongside system components

-**Key design point:** The `sah init` command needs to instantiate tool structs to call their `init()` methods, but does NOT need the full MCP server. Tools implement `Initializable` on lightweight struct instances â€” no `ToolContext` needed for init.
+**Depends on:** Card 2 (macro/supertrait), Card A (constructor fix provides the intermediate state)

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `ShellExecuteTool` implements `Initializable` with deny-bash logic
-- [ ] `CodeContextTool` implements `Initializable` with .code-context/ creation
+- [ ] `ShellExecuteTool` implements `Initializable` with init/deinit (deny-bash)
+- [ ] `CodeContextTool` implements `Initializable` with init/deinit/start/stop
 - [ ] `install_deny_bash()` removed from monolithic init.rs
-- [ ] `sah init` creates `.code-context/` directory
-- [ ] `sah init` still denies Bash tool in settings
+- [ ] Hardcoded `initialize_code_context()` in `ServerHandler::initialize()` replaced by tool `start()` iteration
+- [ ] `sah init` creates `.code-context/`, denies Bash â€” no LSP, no indexing
+- [ ] `sah serve` + client connect â€” code-context `start()` fires, LSP/indexing begin
 - [ ] `sah deinit` cleans up both
-- [ ] No LSP or MCP server started during `sah init`

 ## Tests
 - [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-tools` passes
-- [ ] Manual: `sah init` in a fresh project creates `.code-context/`, denies Bash
-- [ ] Manual: `sah deinit` removes `.code-context/`, restores Bash permission
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-cli` passes
+- [ ] Manual: `sah init` â€” creates `.code-context/`, denies Bash, no background work
+- [ ] Manual: `sah serve` + connect â€” background indexing/LSP start
+- [ ] Manual: `sah deinit` â€” removes `.code-context/`, restores Bash permission
\ No newline at end of file
